title: Suspicious loader path
description: File path contains the keyword 'loader', commonly associated with cheat loaders.
author: retrace-team

title: Suspicious injector path
description: File path contains the keyword 'injector', associated with DLL injection tools.
author: retrace-team

title: Known FiveM cheat tool name
description: File name matches a known FiveM cheat tool or menu.
author: retrace-team

title: Suspicious executable naming pattern
description: Executable or DLL file with naming patterns commonly used by cheat tools.
author: retrace-team

title: Known injection tool in Prefetch
description: Prefetch entry for a known DLL injection tool (execution evidence).
author: retrace-team

title: Executable in transient directory
description: An executable file was found in a temporary or AppData location, which may indicate a dropped payload.
author: retrace-team

title: Hash-named file (potential payload)
description: File with a randomized hex name, often used by loaders to drop temporary payloads.
author: retrace-team

title: FiveM cache directory artifact
description: File found in FiveM cache directory. May contain modified or injected resources.
author: retrace-team

title: Known cheat-related file name
description: File name matches patterns commonly associated with GTA/FiveM cheat tooling.
author: retrace-team

title: Browser download of executable
description: An executable or archive was downloaded through a browser, which may be the origin of a cheat tool.
author: retrace-team

title: Correlated: Loader + Injector evidence chain
description: Both loader path artifacts and injector path artifacts were found, suggesting a complete cheat loading workflow.
author: retrace-team

title: Correlated: Known tool + execution trace
description: A known cheat tool name was found AND Prefetch execution evidence exists, confirming the tool was run.
author: retrace-team

title: Correlated: Temp payload + suspicious naming
description: Files with suspicious naming patterns were found in temp directories alongside hash-named payloads.
author: retrace-team
